name: Tim Kaine
body:
If there was ever a time that called for all of us to get involved, it's now.
---
In 2018, we have a chance to get our country back on track, Derek -- a chance to send the clearest possible message to Trump and his party that this country doesn't support their divisive and corrupt politics.

But the only way we can do that is if millions of us come together. If there was ever a time that called for all of us to get involved, it's now.

**Before Sunday's fundraising deadline, chip in $10 or more to support the Democratic Party as we enter an election year.**

[QUICK DONATE: $10](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/40523d9b/4067b0a/4800054a9/7e5cbeea/4077936184/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/december-deadline-2017?amount=10&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=1+-+QUICK+DONATE+10&utm_campaign=em_20171229_tk_v2s1&source=em_20171229_tk_v2s1&refcode=em_20171229_tk_v2s1")
[QUICK DONATE: $25](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/40523d9b/4067b0a/4800054a9/7e5cbeeb/4077936184/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/december-deadline-2017?amount=25&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=2+-+QUICK+DONATE+25&utm_campaign=em_20171229_tk_v2s1&source=em_20171229_tk_v2s1&refcode=em_20171229_tk_v2s1")
[QUICK DONATE: $50](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/40523d9b/4067b0a/4800054a9/7e5cbee8/4077936184/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/december-deadline-2017?amount=50&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=3+-+QUICK+DONATE+50&utm_campaign=em_20171229_tk_v2s1&source=em_20171229_tk_v2s1&refcode=em_20171229_tk_v2s1")
[QUICK DONATE: $100](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/40523d9b/4067b0a/4800054a9/7e5cbee9/4077936184/VEsC/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/december-deadline-2017?amount=100&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=4+-+QUICK+DONATE+100&utm_campaign=em_20171229_tk_v2s1&source=em_20171229_tk_v2s1&refcode=em_20171229_tk_v2s1")
[QUICK DONATE: $200](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/40523d9b/4067b0a/4800054a9/7e5cbef6/4077936184/VEsD/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/december-deadline-2017?amount=200&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=5+-+QUICK+DONATE+200&utm_campaign=em_20171229_tk_v2s1&source=em_20171229_tk_v2s1&refcode=em_20171229_tk_v2s1")
[Or donate another amount.](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/40523d9b/4067b0a/4800054a9/7e5cbef7/4077936184/VEsA/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/december-deadline-2017?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=6+-+Or+donate+another+amount&utm_campaign=em_20171229_tk_v2s1&source=em_20171229_tk_v2s1&refcode=em_20171229_tk_v2s1")
The best way to fight back against Donald Trump and his politics isn't just by winning back Congress next year -- it's by building out the Democratic Party in every ZIP code across this country, and electing leaders at the state and local level everywhere. That's what we did in Virginia in 2017 -- with strong help from the DNC -- and that's what we can do across this country in 2018.

If we do that, we can win. But let me be clear about something: We won't do it without a strong national party. And creating a strong Democratic Party depends on people like you.

**It's never been more critical for Democrats to support the DNC than it is right now. So before Sunday, will you make a contribution of $10 or whatever you can afford?**

**[https://my.democrats.org/December-Deadline-2017](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/40523d9b/4067b0a/4800054a9/7e5cbef4/4077936184/VEsB/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/december-deadline-2017?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=7+-+httpsmydemocratsorgDecemberDeadline2017&utm_campaign=em_20171229_tk_v2s1&source=em_20171229_tk_v2s1&refcode=em_20171229_tk_v2s1")**

Thank you -- and Happy New Year to you and your family, Derek.

Tim Kaine

Paid for by the Democratic National Committee, 430 South Capitol Street SE, Washington DC 20003 and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. Contributions or gifts to the Democratic National Committee are not tax deductible.

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If this isn't the best email address at which to reach you, [update your contact information](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/40523d9b/4067b0a/4800054a9/7e5cbef5/4077936184/VEsO/ "https://my.democrats.org/page/user/manage?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=8+-+update+your+contact+information&utm_campaign=em_20171229_tk_v2s1&source=em_20171229_tk_v2s1&refcode=em_20171229_tk_v2s1"). Our email list is the best way we have of staying in regular contact with supporters like you across the country and letting you know about the work Democrats are doing. If you like staying in touch, but want to receive only the most important messages, click [here](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/40523d9b/4067b0a/4800054a9/7e5cbef2/4077936184/VEsP/ "https://my.democrats.org/page/signup/less-email?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=9+-+here&utm_campaign=em_20171229_tk_v2s1&source=em_20171229_tk_v2s1&refcode=em_20171229_tk_v2s1"). Click [here](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/40523d9b/4067b0a/4800054a9/7e5cbef3/4077936184/VEsHBQ/ "http://www.democrats.org/unsubscribe?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=10+-+here&utm_campaign=em_20171229_tk_v2s1&source=em_20171229_tk_v2s1&refcode=em_20171229_tk_v2s1") to unsubscribe from our supporter list, but if you leave, it will be harder for you to stay involved in the organization that you've been such a critical part of. This organization is powered by you, and we'd love to hear your ideas. Send us any comments, criticisms, or feedback [here](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/40523d9b/4067b0a/4800054a9/7e5cbef0/4077936184/VEsHBA/ "http://my.democrats.org/page/s/contact-the-democrats?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=11+-+here&utm_campaign=em_20171229_tk_v2s1&source=em_20171229_tk_v2s1&refcode=em_20171229_tk_v2s1"), or just reply to this email! Thanks for supporting our party.

subject: Our year in review, Friend
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Republican National Committee
body:
A VERY important message! |
---
| | | | | | |

Friend,

If you listen to the media talk about 2017, they paint a VERY different picture than what I see when I travel the country and talk to the American people.

This is dangerous. And it's why we must stay vigilant in getting the truth out to the American people.

But there is one thing they cannot lie about: our NUMBERS. We are closing out the first year of our presidency -- yes, it is OUR presidency -- and I want to be sure we report an extraordinary year.

_As always, it is not about the size of your donation. It is the fact that you _PROVED_ you care about this cause so much that you actually stepped up and made a contribution. That is why we won, and why we will keep winning._
---

My resolution for 2018 is to go above and beyond to get our accomplishments heard by every single citizen of our great country. When EVERYONE tried to take us down in 2016, we prevailed. And we will win this new fight with the Fake News Media again in 2018.

I have never walked away from a fight in my entire life. I don't care what they throw at us. No matter the slur they use against me or my family, or even YOU, I will fight back ten times harder.

So let's close the _FINAL_ FEC REPORT OF THE FIRST YEAR OF OUR PRESIDENCY with numbers so big that even the media will be forced to say that our first year in office will forever be etched into the archives of American history.

USA! USA! USA!

name: Maya Cantrell, Democrats.org
subject: Hi, Derek, I'm Maya
body:
When we have the resources to get our message out, we win.
---
**Chip in $10 before our end-of-year FEC deadline to give Democrats the resources to take on Republicans and win.
**[DONATE](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/40523da9/4067b0a/48ebfc0c3/7e5c8a50/4211594308/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/december-deadline-2017?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=1+-+DONATE&utm_campaign=em_20171229_mc_v2s1&source=em_20171229_mc_v2s1&refcode=em_20171229_mc_v2s1")**
**
Hi, Derek. My name is Maya -- the Southern Regional Mobilization Director here at the DNC. I'm responsible for driving our mobilization efforts in states like Virginia and Alabama, where I just returned from a couple of weeks ago.

Now that I'm back and had time to reflect on our victories, I thought it was important to report back to you on how we won, what we've learned, and what's coming up next.

This year, the team at the DNC has been all about expanding access to platforms to help Democrats organize and make our voices heard. While on the ground in Virginia and Alabama, I worked to ensure our state parties and candidates could utilize the latest tools and technology to help mobilize voters to the polls.

When we have the resources to get our message out, we win. That's how we elected Doug Jones and Ralph Northam, as well as Democrats up and down the ticket. We can repeat our success next November if we take this blueprint and apply it to every state -- but we can only do that with your help.

**Chip in $10 before Sunday's deadline to help power our movement and elect Democrats in 2018.**

[QUICK DONATE: $10](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/40523da9/4067b0a/48ebfc0c3/7e5c8a51/4211594308/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/december-deadline-2017?amount=10&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=2+-+QUICK+DONATE+10&utm_campaign=em_20171229_mc_v2s1&source=em_20171229_mc_v2s1&refcode=em_20171229_mc_v2s1")
[QUICK DONATE: $25](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/40523da9/4067b0a/48ebfc0c3/7e5c8a5e/4211594308/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/december-deadline-2017?amount=25&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=3+-+QUICK+DONATE+25&utm_campaign=em_20171229_mc_v2s1&source=em_20171229_mc_v2s1&refcode=em_20171229_mc_v2s1")
[QUICK DONATE: $50](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/40523da9/4067b0a/48ebfc0c3/7e5c8a5f/4211594308/VEsC/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/december-deadline-2017?amount=50&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=4+-+QUICK+DONATE+50&utm_campaign=em_20171229_mc_v2s1&source=em_20171229_mc_v2s1&refcode=em_20171229_mc_v2s1")
[QUICK DONATE: $100](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/40523da9/4067b0a/48ebfc0c3/7e5c8a5c/4211594308/VEsD/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/december-deadline-2017?amount=100&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=5+-+QUICK+DONATE+100&utm_campaign=em_20171229_mc_v2s1&source=em_20171229_mc_v2s1&refcode=em_20171229_mc_v2s1")
[QUICK DONATE: $200](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/40523da9/4067b0a/48ebfc0c3/7e5c8a5d/4211594308/VEsA/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/december-deadline-2017?amount=200&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=6+-+QUICK+DONATE+200&utm_campaign=em_20171229_mc_v2s1&source=em_20171229_mc_v2s1&refcode=em_20171229_mc_v2s1")
[Or donate another amount.](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/40523da9/4067b0a/48ebfc0c3/7e5c8a5a/4211594308/VEsB/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/december-deadline-2017?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=7+-+Or+donate+another+amount&utm_campaign=em_20171229_mc_v2s1&source=em_20171229_mc_v2s1&refcode=em_20171229_mc_v2s1")
When we started 2017, the future looked bleak. But we didn't abandon our ideals, Derek. We organized and resisted. We rolled up our sleeves and got to work -- and now Democrats are winning elections again.

That's only because we've gotten the job done together.

**[Your $10 contribution can help fund critical organizing work as we take our winning strategy to all 50 states. Will you chip in before Sunday's important fundraising deadline?](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/40523da9/4067b0a/48ebfc0c3/7e5c8a5b/4211594308/VEsO/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/december-deadline-2017?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=8+-+Your+10+contribution+can+help+fund+criti&utm_campaign=em_20171229_mc_v2s1&source=em_20171229_mc_v2s1&refcode=em_20171229_mc_v2s1")**

Thanks for stepping up to put Democrats on the path to victory in 2018.

Maya

Maya Cantrell
Southern Regional Mobilization Director

This organization is powered by you, and we'd love to hear your ideas. Send us any comments, criticisms, or feedback [here](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/40523da9/4067b0a/48ebfc0c3/7e5c8a67/4211594308/VEsHBw/ "http://my.democrats.org/page/s/contact-the-democrats?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=12+-+here&utm_campaign=em_20171229_mc_v2s1&source=em_20171229_mc_v2s1&refcode=em_20171229_mc_v2s1"), or just reply to this email! Thanks for supporting our party.

name: Ralph Northam
subject: join me?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kaine for Virginia
body:
Derek,

I wanted to thank you for all of your hard work and generous support throughout my campaign. As a longtime supporter of Tim Kaine, you really stepped up to help make sure I was elected Governor and Virginia's progress could continue.

It was a long year. From the dismay of watching detrimental policies coming out of Washington time and again, to a hard-fought primary race, to the sprint of this fall's election, there was a whole lot of work to be done. And together, we accomplished so much. **[But here in Virginia, we don't get a whole lot of time to sit back and relax -- we get right back up and keep on toward the next fight.](http://salsa3.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=pP5IyTH5vt0DLuqNcmqLn2H1rzdFXrfe)**

I was so grateful for Tim's help during my campaign, and now that it's time for him to run again, I want to help him out. That's why I'm ready to do everything I can to make sure he's re-elected to the Senate. I need a strong partner in Washington, and I know I can count on Tim -- and so can hardworking Virginians and Americans who deserve a voice they trust in Congress.

[**Will you join me? Tim's facing a huge FEC deadline SUNDAY night at midnight.**](http://salsa3.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=m0o9wcbRfxqy0%2BTX1mkQkmH1rzdFXrfe) When the FEC posts the year-end fundraising numbers for candidates, it's a signal to the rest of the world about who's ready to win. So we need Tim's year-end numbers to be really good.

Please dig deep and pitch in $20.18 (or whatever you can afford!) to show you're ready for Tim Kaine and Democrats all across America to win, and win big, in 2018:

**[https://timkaine.com/year-end-deadline](http://salsa3.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=YHtQ7HvXPnNEEw6QdEASqGH1rzdFXrfe)**

Thank you so much.

Ralph Northam

| | [**DONATE**](http://salsa3.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=1quYvtdVgOsaZjq%2FZrugzWH1rzdFXrfe)

subject: I'm all in for 2018 -- are you, friend?

body:
The outpouring of support from grassroots members like you made Doug Jones' win in Alabama possible. We'll need that same level of support to take back the Senate in 2018. So I'm asking, please pitch in before our critical end-of-year deadline >>
---
[](http://action.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/all-in-for-2018?refcode=DPE-20171229-Booker-ProsHV&recurring=auto&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&amount=5&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1= &city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=")
Friend --

The results out of the Alabama special election are nothing short of inspiring.

Inspiring not only because my friend Doug Jones won despite all odds, but because of supporters like you who stepped up in a HUGE way to lead him to victory.

And it was this same support that helped Democrats lead an extraordinary, weeks-on-end grassroots get-out-the-vote effort (which I got to witness myself!) -- reaching Alabamians through thousands of phone calls, text messages, and door knocks.

Friend, if we use this same energy and strategy in next year's midterm election -- imagine what we can accomplish! [**So I 'm asking, team -- will you join me and say you're "all in for 2018" by chipping in $1 or whatever amount you can right now to help the Senate Democrats compete in every state.**](http://action.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/all-in-for-2018?refcode=DPE-20171229-Booker-ProsHV&recurring=auto&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&amount=5&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1= &city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=")

Many of my Democratic Senate colleagues are up for re-election next year -- including some in states President Trump won -- and they're already being attacked by GOP super PACs.

But with your support, we can help counter these attacks. **The DSCC is the only committee dedicated solely to the election of a Democratic Senate and we only need to flip two seats to take back the Senate.**

So friend, let's roll up our sleeves, gear up, and keep on fighting and competing in every state.

**Make the pledge to be "all in for 2018" today, team. Chip in $1 now before the DSCC's critical end-of-year deadline to build on our momentum in EVERY state.**

name: Leah
subject: HUGE
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Leah for Senate
body:
It’s our END OF YEAR fundraising deadline, and as of this email, we are short by $18,500. As I’ve said before, these FEC deadlines are a tool of th

Friend, we’re just 3 days away from the biggest test our campaign has faced.

**It’s our END OF YEAR fundraising deadline, and as of this email, we are short by $18,500. **

As I’ve said before, these FEC deadlines are a tool of the Washington elite. It's how they choose winners and losers. The candidates with big donors who make the most money are deemed "worthy," while little guys like us -- who rely on grassroots donors -- are deemed less prepared for office.

But Friend, if our end-of-year numbers are big, the Washington establishment won't know what to do!

name: Chris Van Hollen
subject: look for the stars
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Van Hollen for US Senate
body:
| Dr. Martin Luther King Jr. reminded us that, "only in darkness can you see the stars."

This has been a turbulent year for our nation and the world. But while the challenges we face are difficult, they have also awakened Americans to the critical importance of being directly engaged in our democracy and active in shaping our society and building a brighter future.

I want to thank you for your engagement and commitment to our common goal of seeking a more perfect union and a more peaceful world.

We have our work cut out for us in 2018, but I believe that working together we can succeed in moving this country in a positive direction.

Our family wishes you and yours a healthy, happy and consequential new year!

name: Russ Feingold, LegitAction
subject: Americans you would recognize
body:
[ Legit ]LegitAction

Friend,

Do you know who’s fighting alongside you? Your fellow Legit members
are Americans you would recognize.

* The most common professions of LegitAction contributors are
teachers, office managers, and nurses.
* People named Devon, Cathy, or Bill have made a combined 294
contributions.
* Contributions have come in from everywhere from Aberdeen, New
Jersey and Abiquiu, New Mexico to Zillah, Washington and
Zionsville, Indiana.

LegitAction is dedicated to building a grassroots movement of everyday
Americans, and it’s working because people like you want to be a part
of it. But to keep growing in 2018, we have to reach our financial
goal before the year ends.

[ https://act.legitaction.com/go/4362?t=1002&akid=503%2E356062%2Eml8Nnh ]We’re $5,270 toward our $15,000 end-of-year goal, and 2017 runs out
less than two days from now. Contribute
$3 today.

The legitimacy crisis continues to erode our democracy just about
everywhere you look in this great country.

But just about everywhere you look, there’s a Legit member pushing
back. And even though opponents of legitimacy control the levers of
power in Washington, D.C. right now, together, we can make real
progress if we look for the right opportunities.

And that’s why so many Americans you would recognize are doing their
part and stepping up to support LegitAction. But with so much at stake
in 2018, we can’t afford to wait. I have to ask people to step up now,
before the year ends.

[ https://act.legitaction.com/go/4362?t=1003&akid=503%2E356062%2Eml8Nnh ]Contribute $3 to help
us reach our end-of-year goal before 2017 is gone for good. We can’t
get there without people like you.

We don’t take money from corporate or special interests. We never
will. Instead, we work to restore the voices of you and your fellow
Americans -- and we rely on your support to do it.

Thank you for standing up for democratic legitimacy today,

Russ Feingold
LegitAction

subject: Our team's note
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Florida Democratic Party
body:
Want to win back the House in 2018 and defend our Senate seat? Then you need to see this -- >

**Begin forwarded message:**
> Team,
>
> The speculation about a historic Democratic wave in 2018 has grown tenfold since we turned Alabama on its head with Doug Jones' hard-fought victory.
>
> But that hasn't stopped the GOP from blowing full steam ahead with their tax cuts for the mega-rich and tax hikes for the rest of us. It's despicable.

| **_What a Year!_** It's been a big year! Republicans across the state -- from precinct committeemen to county chairmen to our entire team at the Indiana Republican Party -- have been hard at work to grow our party and gear up for an even bigger year in 2018.

That's while our Republican leaders are implementing bold reforms -- from historic tax reform in Washington to a long-term infrastructure plan here in Indiana.

Thanks for helping make 2017 great -- and let's look ahead to a victorious 2018\. Happy New Year!

-Kyle Hupfer

name: Jason Yates
subject: What we learned from you…
body:
| | We’re united, and we are listening.
---
[ ](http://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=http%3A%2F%2Fwww.myfaithvotes.org%2Fcommunity-input&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=171229_apl_s1&n=1)
| Peter, 2016 was the year we began our work at My Faith Votes. We didn’t slow down in 2017. And you were a part of it. It's been two years of listening, learning, and experimenting to design the most effective ways to inspire and empower Jesus followers to unite and take a stand in a broken culture. We're spending these last few days of 2017 giving thanks for you – for the many opportunities we took a stand together and what we've learned from you. **You told us what you're standing for and what you'd like to see us stand for -- and that helped us equip others.** _“You made it easy for me to express my opinions to members of Congress. I had no idea that I would be receiving so many replies to the emails you sent on my behalf. Thank you for taking care of this very important message to this Committee for me. I would not have known about it if it had not been for My Faith Votes”_
–**Cindy T., Lake Charles, LA** **You told us that prayer is critical.** _“GOD gave us this Great Country, America, The Land of the FREE. We are at the point of losing all of our freedom. If we have the FAITH that we can turn this Country around, we need to be on our knees every day!”_
–**Becky E., Robert Lee, TX** **You encouraged us to be focused solely on Christ, not on political parties.** _“Elections really do matter and we need to vote according to Christian values. However, I also think we need Christian conviction that is greater than political parties and not to assume that Christian values all belong to one party.”_
–**Bob F., Woodridge, IL** **You told us you want specific suggestions for putting your faith into action.** _“I just wanted to say thank you SO much for the format you provide in your weekly Intersect email. It is most wonderful to know the issue and how to think and pray about it, but the added benefit of taking action is what I really needed - THANK YOU.”_
–**Peggy S., St. Petersburg, FL** [Tell us how we can help you in 2018, or how you plan to take a stand for Christ in your community in 2018. It doesn't have to be big and lofty -- it just has to be doable.](http://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=http%3A%2F%2Fwww.myfaithvotes.org%2Fcommunity-input&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=171229_apl_s1&n=2) Each time you share something with us -- whether it's a story, a person we should know, an idea, or a faith story -- you're actively helping to unite Christians across this nation. And you're helping to grow this movement that's going to grow and empower millions of Christ followers, equipping them to take a stand for Christian values so that America stands strong with God. We're just getting started. **United. We Stand.**
-The My Faith Votes Team [](http://www3.myfaithvotes.org/171231apl03?e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=171229_apl_s1&n=3)
* * *
_My Faith Votes is a non-partisan movement focused on motivating Christians in America to participate in local and national elections and be active members of society. By partnering with local churches, pastors, and national faith leaders, My Faith Votes mobilizes and equips Christians to lead the conversation on the place of faith in culture and politics._
---
* * *
©2017 My Faith Votes
10940 S Parker, 640, Parker, CO 80134
This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](dpwillis67@gmail.com).
To stop receiving emails, [click here](http://www2.myfaithvotes.org/unsubscribe?e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=171229_apl_s1&n=4).
[ ](http://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=http%3A%2F%2Fwww.facebook.com%2Fmyfaithvotes&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=171229_apl_s1&n=5) [ ](http://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=http%3A%2F%2Fwww.twitter.com%2Fmyfaithvotes&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=171229_apl_s1&n=6) [ ](http://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=http%3A%2F%2Fwww.instagram.com%2Fmyfaithvotes&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=171229_apl_s1&n=7)

Peter,

Abortion bans. The tax scam bill. Obamacare repeals.

Name a bill that's terrible for women, middle class families, or the most vulnerable, and Republicans have tried to pass it.

Which is why we're determined to find strong candidates who can help flip the House AND Senate next year and stop President Trump and congressional Republicans' dangerous agenda.

But we need to support all of our pro-choice Democratic women running for re-election and defeat dozens of vulnerable Republicans to help make that happen.

**[Donate $3 to become a 2018 EMILY's List member and help stop the Trump agenda by replacing congressional Republicans with our women.](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c697c/24c69fd9/1444fb1b1/1893ba58/325205326/VEsE/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/contribute/20171220_email_EOY-membership?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=2+-+Donate+if+consinConsGroup9050+to+renew+y&utm_campaign=WQEFRL46N_digital_email_20171229_EOYNoMoreTrumpAgenda_inact&source=WQEFRL46N_digital_email_20171229_EOYNoMoreTrumpAgenda_inact")**

Republicans' majority control of Congress puts them in a position to pass legislation that's bad for women and families, confirm unqualified judicial nominees, and even put an end to the investigation of Trump's ties to Russia.

But next year, that could change.

We need to re-elect all of our women in Congress and flip 24 seats in the House and two seats in the Senate for Democrats to take control. We've already endorsed 21 red-to-blue challengers to help get it done (with more to come), so taking back both chambers of Congress, with a wave of pro-choice Democratic women, is _well_ within reach.

All of them need our strongest support to win next year and turn Congress blue.

**NH REPUBLICAN PARTY**
**WEEKLY NEWSLETTER**
**FRIDAY, DECEMBER 29TH**
|
---
**_A Note From Jeanie_**
**Dear Derek,**

**December’s Dangerous Democrat doesn’t appear to be getting a lot of press. And some wonder why President Donald J. Trump feels it is necessary to tweet! Folks if the press won’t cover it, Republicans need to!**
****
**In November last year, Democrat Representative Kathy Rogers assaulted a Republican observer (Susan Olsen) at a ballot recount between Democrat Andrew Hosmer and Republican Harold French. Rogers whacked Olsen upside the head when Olsen “asked for the ballots to be moved closer so she could see them better.” (Yeah, I agree, that was a pretty unreasonable request!) It didn’t get a lot of press then, and last week when she plead guilty in court, it still didn’t get much press.**
****
**NH Democrat Party Chair Ray Buckley and Minority Leader Steve Shurtleff were in the court room to support this bad behavior. They witnessed Rogers accepting a plea deal for a misdemeanor assault charge that requires her to take an anger management class. [The plea deal allowed her to avoid fines and jail time.](http://email.robly.com/wf/click?upn=gT2AZ1ZnBy-2FrecDREa9-2BbY1qiyT3HuRDH6pVWPAnYR6bF1dllSjNSiobxYcnZ9IB4g8gsoWpOSJbQmtx14tA2lI8uRQm2a2IygxnvGz55mAKV8plhDF-2BRgB1soOZE9-2Bm_enNSH-2FxHAAqXgxiHRFihpX91d75ERAkpfg4XQfmYhCFb47pW8iDRAYLsM9sf9wIa92fG-2FsxU68zXzzMA2nO2VCunl2bm-2FhLXsWS8P3XITs28GUU7Mnlu37POPaWv9myv4YWBbFU9plZi0-2B42tZfBaUujH4mxA3e6jOiyDa5q6HKz45-2B17g6DUNL-2BnIMAR30MuRws08VEWMjo8XdIkPoTMsrEgdNFl-2FP9bIA5E-2F-2BMmasQT-2BU9UYadPXa35DpdemBMPbybwltHHh-2B-2FE281h8tx772IfzPfO54UBx5yOPJs5cr5YGStxICdBDypLRvn5vH9hUKJJ3FjUr1IIdo1Ap-2BrXHpHHC-2FhMkvDRKLRv7M6tJ89R6akc-2FaeVLq3ntk4hJk0CYIVSr-2BfJzw985-2FmEIJOmAzqYQ8YTJt8ug1xQFCA5zYMEXk1DEywt28xYc46ofmkHzIpI8wV-2Bjh2RzmXb88TZQ-3D-3D)**
****
**What is stunning is that by their silence, these two Democrats are accepting violence against women. Neither have asked for Rogers to resign her seat and Rogers apparently believes hitting someone in the head is acceptable behavior. For those of you who don’t know, Rogers is serving her sixth term in the House, representing Concord Wards 8-10. She served as Merrimack County Attorney from 2009-2011.**
****
**So folks, this is a call to action! If you live in Concord, time to write a letter to the editor demanding Rogers to step down. (Do you really want someone with anger issues representing you in Concord?) **
****
**If you agree that this type of violent behavior against women is unacceptable,[tweet using #ResignRogers](http://email.robly.com/wf/click?upn=3qP3xl6Iy86fMdiFlFopyDWQyLQgc7Vh29qMNTZttFs-3D_enNSH-2FxHAAqXgxiHRFihpX91d75ERAkpfg4XQfmYhCFb47pW8iDRAYLsM9sf9wIa92fG-2FsxU68zXzzMA2nO2VCunl2bm-2FhLXsWS8P3XITs28GUU7Mnlu37POPaWv9myv4YWBbFU9plZi0-2B42tZfBaUujH4mxA3e6jOiyDa5q6HKz45-2B17g6DUNL-2BnIMAR30MuRws08VEWMjo8XdIkPoTMsrEgdNFl-2FP9bIA5E-2F-2BMmasQT-2BU9UYadPXa35DpdemBMPbybwltHHh-2B-2FE281h8tx74ib0L8P7mnusM4A5ta5k296FZi0S1qnvuT7SrRhdCnR9PYL4-2FV8m-2F-2F0N5hsncP43MJvj2FWZ5YwceRnPvVN42nGhCizs-2BLXwnohoZQRjdvFRac7JCi8FbBgddwp-2FjwWifZMUuiNC-2BE1gWjtlB-2Fc8q8r8zeAhJYeBO6xRF6Jf2HJ-2Fwv8cZ-2BfXZePkh0by3ThdA-3D-3D) to pressure Rogers to resign! **

**Sincerely, **

**Jeanie**

clean_body: | | nh.gop NH REPUBLICAN PARTY WEEKLY NEWSLETTER FRIDAY, DECEMBER 29TH | A Note From Jeanie Dear Derek, December’s Dangerous Democrat doesn’t appear to be getting a lot of press. And some wonder why President Donald J. Trump feels it is necessary to tweet! Folks if the press won’t cover it, Republicans need to! ** In November last year, Democrat Representative Kathy Rogers assaulted a Republican observer (Susan Olsen) at a ballot recount between Democrat Andrew Hosmer and Republican Harold French. Rogers whacked Olsen upside the head when Olsen “asked for the ballots to be moved closer so she could see them better.” (Yeah, I agree, that was a pretty unreasonable request!) It didn’t get a lot of press then, and last week when she plead guilty in court, it still didn’t get much press. NH Democrat Party Chair Ray Buckley and Minority Leader Steve Shurtleff were in the court room to support this bad behavior. They witnessed Rogers accepting a plea deal for a misdemeanor assault charge that requires her to take an anger management class. What is stunning is that by their silence, these two Democrats are accepting violence against women. Neither have asked for Rogers to resign her seat and Rogers apparently believes hitting someone in the head is acceptable behavior. For those of you who don’t know, Rogers is serving her sixth term in the House, representing Concord Wards 8-10. She served as Merrimack County Attorney from 2009-2011. So folks, this is a call to action! If you live in Concord, time to write a letter to the editor demanding Rogers to step down. (Do you really want someone with anger issues representing you in Concord?) If you agree that this type of violent behavior against women is unacceptable, to pressure Rogers to resign! Sincerely, Jeanie Join the Grassroots Circle! The Grassroots Circle is a unique way for you to get involved while supporting the Party. Becoming a member couldn't be easier -- join today for as little as $10 per month. There are three levels of support: The Grassroots Supporter, the NHGOP Advocate and the VIP Investor. Intern with the NH GOP! Are you a student or know a student that is interested in Politics? Learn the skills necessary to win elections and meet the Republican leaders that govern our State and write legislation. TAX REFORM CALCULATOR PHOTO OF THE WEEK President Trump keeps his promise made to Jaden Thomson during the FITN Primary to Cut Taxes, Cut Spending & Cut the size of Government by signing the Tax Cuts and Jobs Act this past week! **Jaden is the Great Grandson of former Governor Mel Thomson of New Hampshire. From January 2017: “He’s cut taxes, cut spending, and cut the size of government. He did everything he could to get rid of Obamacare. The President is working on energy independence and is almost there. This is one voter who is extremely pleased with what President Trump has done – he’s delivered on his promises.” said Tom Thomson. “He gets an A+ for his first year in office.” REPUBLICAN SPOTLIGHT Thank you for all of your submissions! This week's Republican spotlight is Education Commissioner Frank Edelblut! Commissioner Edelblut has been a committed leader of the Education Department, bringing necessary reforms and a new vision in his role as commissioner.
